author: AllenX95
description: Embeds MiMo-Code CLI Agent as an AI collaborator in your vault. Your vault becomes the working directory, giving MiMo-Code capabilities for file reads and writes, search, bash commands, and multi-step workflows. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: AllenX95
manifest.description: Embeds MiMo-Code CLI Agent as an AI collaborator in your vault. Your vault becomes the working directory, giving MiMo-Code capabilities for file reads and writes, search, bash commands, and multi-step workflows.
manifest.name: Sidebar MiMo-Code

name: Sidebar MiMo-Code

releases.author: AllenX95
releases.description:
## What's Changed

- Removed the stale Bun lockfile so npm is the single package manager.
- Resolved Obsidian automated review warnings while retaining compatibility with Obsidian 1.7.2.
- Updated Hono to 4.12.26 to address current security advisories.
- Added compatibility tests for destructive confirmation buttons.

releases.author: AllenX95
releases.description: here's v1.0.0 of the sidebar-mimocode plugin for Obisdiian
